name: Sub or Dub
description: Shows which foreign-language TV shows and movies are available dubbed, subbed, both, or not in your preferred language.
overview: Shows which foreign-language TV shows and movies are available dubbed, subbed, both, or not in your preferred language.

versions.changelog:
feat: show all content, per-season status breakdown, and dubbed language detection fix

- All library content is now included in scan results; items originally in
  the preferred language are shown with an "In Preferred Language" badge
  instead of being silently excluded
- Fixed original-language detection for dubbed content where the preferred
  language is set as the default audio track (e.g. English-dubbed anime)
- Series now scan every episode rather than just the first; seasons with
  differing availability are reported as "Mixed" with a clickable per-season
  breakdown in the results table
- Added SeasonLanguageInfo model and SeasonBreakdown field to MediaLanguageInfo
- Bumped version to 1.1.0.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
